scripts.build:core: pnpm --filter scorpio.di run build && pnpm --filter scorpio.ai run build && pnpm --filter sbot.plugin run build && pnpm --filter sbot.commons run build
scripts.build:wiki: pnpm --filter wiki.base run build && pnpm --filter wiki.local run build && pnpm --filter wiki.gdrive run build
scripts.build:channel: pnpm --filter channel.base run build && pnpm --filter channel.lark run build && pnpm --filter channel.slack run build && pnpm --filter channel.wecom run build && pnpm --filter channel.wechat run build && pnpm --filter channel.onebot run build && pnpm --filter channel.xiaoai run build && pnpm --filter channel.dingtalk run build && pnpm --filter channel.qq run build
scripts.build:deps: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:wiki && pnpm run build:channel
scripts.debug:sbot: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter sbot-admin run build && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot run debug
scripts.build:sbot: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter sbot-admin run build && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot run build
scripts.publish:sbot: pnpm run build:sbot && pnpm --filter @qingfeng346/sbot publish --no-git-checks --access public
scripts.link:sbot: pnpm run build:sbot && npm link packages/sbot/dist
scripts.debug:cli: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-cli run debug
scripts.build:cli: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-cli run build
scripts.publish:cli: pnpm run build:cli && pnpm --filter sbot-cli publish --no-git-checks
scripts.debug:admin: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-admin run debug
scripts.build:admin: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter sbot-admin run build
scripts.build:vscode: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter sbot-vscode run build
scripts.install:vscode: pnpm run build:vscode && pnpm --filter sbot-vscode run install-ext
scripts.debug:app: pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/app run dev
scripts.build:app:macos: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/app run macos:build
scripts.build:app:windows: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/app run windows:build
scripts.build:app:linux: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/app run linux:build
scripts.debug:app:android: pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/app run android:dev
scripts.build:app:android: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/app run android:build
scripts.debug:app:ios: pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/app run ios:dev
scripts.build:app:ios: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm run assets && pnpm --filter @sbot/app run ios:build
scripts.docker:sbot: pnpm run build:sbot && node packages/sbot/scripts/docker.js build && node packages/sbot/scripts/docker.js save
scripts.docker:sbot:publish: pnpm run build:sbot && node packages/sbot/scripts/docker.js build && node packages/sbot/scripts/docker.js publish
